name: list_assets
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.totalValueCc === output.result.assets.reduce((s, a) => s + (Number(a.valueCc) || 0), 0)
_note: list_assets is a user-scoped READ. A fresh caller (assassin internal owner actor → {}) returns ok:true with an empty inventory (assets [], totalValueCc 0) — never no_actor / no_db (in-memory globalThis._concordSTATE.inheritanceEstates). CONSERVATION invariant: totalValueCc is exactly the sum of the stored asset valueCc fields — no CC is fabricated in aggregation. byCategory groups the same values; each category's valueCc sub-total is derived only from real stored assets.
